chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appln. No.S-951 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-8396/2016 2. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on MA-8397/2016 3. For hearing. 10.11.2016. Mr. G.M Afaque, Advocate alongwith applicant. = 1. Granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. It is, inter-alia, contended that applicant/accused is innocent and has been falsely implicated by the complainant with ulterior motives. He further states that co-accused have already been granted protective bail by this Court on 28.06.2016 and the present applicant/accused be given same treatment, so that he may defend his case before the Special Court, Sindh Public Property Removal of Encroachment, Hyderabad. Without touching upon the merits of the case, the applicant/ accused is admitted to protective bail for a period of 10 days commencing from today, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- (Twenty Five Thousand) with P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. However, it is clarified that this order shall cease to exist on 19.11.2016 or on the day when the applicant/accused surrenders himself before the concerned Court. The Bail application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Shahid
